titleStmt.title: SII 9.625: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 625. (A.R. No. 390 of 1920.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE OUTER WALL OF THE OBALESVARA TEMPLE AT GADEKALLU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Plavaṅga, Bhādrapada, ba. 13, in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya, corresponding to A.D. 1547 September 11, Sunday (not verifiable). It records that Appalarāja-Ayya issued orders to the Gauḍa and Sēnabōvas of Urvakoṇḍeya-sīme exempting the barbers of certain classes of villages in the above locality from kāṇike, biṭṭi, birāḍa, kappa and other taxes.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
plavaṁgasaṁvatsarada
bhādrapada ba 103 śrīmaṁ
mahārājadhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāsi
varāyamahārāyara rājyadāḷike
lū Appalarāja Ayyanavara Appaṇe
yiṁdalū Urvakoṁḍeya sīme ya
gauḍasēnabōvarige baṁda nirūpa
pramāṇa Urvakoṁḍege saluva bheṁ
ḍāra grāma Agrahāra dēvastāna
grāmagaḷalū yidaṁtā nāyiṁda
rige teṟige hoṟige kāṇike kappa
biṭṭi birāḍa Āvadū yillayeṁdu
koṭṭa nāyiṁdara śāsana vopita
śrīmallikārjunadēvaru . yi śāsana
ke Āru vobaru tapidare vāraṇāsi
yalū gōva koṁda pāpadalū
hōharu yeṁdu koṭa śāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.625 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
